title: Web-messaging-based dissemination of urban rainfall and flood information: a Telegram bot framework
content: This study presents a Telegram bot framework for near real-time urban rainfall and flood information, combining automated data acquisition and probabilistic flood risk maps to support decision-making in resource-constrained cities.
snippet: This study presents a Telegram bot framework for near real-time urban rainfall and flood information, combining automated data acquisition and probabilistic flood risk maps to support decision-making

title: Pacific Webinar on the Global Disaster-Related Statistics Framework (G-DRSF)
content: This webinar, organized by UNDRR, ESCAP and SPC, will introduce the Global Disaster-Related Statistics Framework and explore its practical relevance for countries in the Pacific region.
snippet: This webinar, organized by UNDRR, ESCAP and SPC, will introduce the Global Disaster-Related Statistics Framework and explore its practical relevance for countries in the Pacific region.

title: Extreme heat escapes insurance losses despite mounting physical climate risk
content: IAG finds Australians remain underprepared despite widespread heatwave impacts
snippet: IAG finds Australians remain underprepared despite widespread heatwave impacts

title: Study finds clear‑cut logging can dramatically increase flood risk
content: This study from the University of British Columbia finds that, without logging, flood risk due to reduced snow melt was decreasing. But after logging, this was reversed, leading to significant upward trend in flood risk.
snippet: This study from the University of British Columbia finds that, without logging, flood risk due to reduced snow melt was decreasing. But after logging, this was reversed, leading to significant upward

title: AI-enhanced rare-event sampling helps predict extreme weather
content: The frequency of extreme weather events can be predicted more accurately than presently possible by combining artificial intelligence (AI) with physical climate modelling, using a protocol called rare-event sampling.

title: When drought, dry landscapes and growing towns collide: Wildfire hotspots in Southern Europe
content: In some parts of Southern Europe, more than half of the land has burned at least once in the last two decades.
snippet: In some parts of Southern Europe, more than half of the land has burned at least once in the last two decades.

title: First Workshop on Language Technologies for Crisis Preparedness and Response (LT4CPR)
content: Language Technologies for Crisis Preparedness and Response (LT4CPR) focuses on speech and language technologies that support crisis preparedness, disaster risk reduction, and crisis response.
snippet: Language Technologies for Crisis Preparedness and Response (LT4CPR) focuses on speech and language technologies that support crisis preparedness, disaster risk reduction, and crisis response.

title: A strengthened and fit-for purpose State Hydrometorological Service in Moldova: a road map

title: A spatiotemporal-magnitude integrated framework for debris flow activity assessment in the Eastern Himalayan syntaxis

title: After action review: Facilitation guide
content: The Anticipation Hub has published the first edition of its facilitation guide for collective, multi-agency After Action Reviews. These events help partners to learn from how they planned for, coordinated ahead of and acted during a forecast hazard.

title: Indigenous peoples and knowledge in climate adaptation planning for mountain regions
content: This brief examines how Indigenous Peoples and Indigenous knowledge are reflected in National Adaptation Plans across mountain regions worldwide.
snippet: This brief examines how Indigenous Peoples and Indigenous knowledge are reflected in National Adaptation Plans across mountain regions worldwide.

title: The role of social assistance in advancing climate adaptation and nature based solutions in least developed countries
content: This working paper examines how social assistance programs can support climate adaptation and nature-based solutions (NbS) in least developed countries (LDCs).
snippet: This working paper examines how social assistance programs can support climate adaptation and nature-based solutions (NbS) in least developed countries (LDCs).

title: Climate risks to Syria’s electricity systems
content: This briefing paper presents key findings from a semi-quantitative climate risk assessment of Syria's electricity sector, intended to support the country's reconstruction efforts.
snippet: This briefing paper presents key findings from a semi-quantitative climate risk assessment of Syria's electricity sector, intended to support the country's reconstruction efforts.

title: Race to beat the heat: climate change impacts physical activity
content: This article examines the impact of climate change—particularly the increasing frequency, intensity, and duration of extreme heat events—on physical activity and sports participation.
snippet: This article examines the impact of climate change—particularly the increasing frequency, intensity, and duration of extreme heat events—on physical activity and sports participation.

title: Vulnerability assessment to tropical cyclones in the North Caribbean Coast of Nicaragua (1988–2022)

title: Empowering readiness before impact: M7.8 Mindanao earthquake case study

title: Research finds connection to place predicts hurricane
content: A study published in Risk Analysis, finds that among residents living in flood-prone areas, place attachment is strongly related to protective action.

title: Fossil fuels are heating America’s 250th birthday

title: As Europe’s heat wave shifts east, seasonal resilience is no longer enough

title: Mapping Africa’s changing coastline

title: Nepal’s improving but inadequate monsoon disaster preparedness
content: True preparedness means resilient infrastructure, investment in disaster risk reduction and stabilising fragile slopes.
snippet: True preparedness means resilient infrastructure, investment in disaster risk reduction and stabilising fragile slopes.

title: China launches oceanographic satellite for enhanced marine monitoring

title: Overcoming the limitations of social media analytics: Dynamic capabilities and workaround strategies for inclusive and resilient public service continuity
